title: Economy achievability spider chart
delivery: Designers and leads can see gather→craft→equip coverage in one radar view — exposes economy gaps blocking player progression.
playerImpact: Informs which materials, recipes, and harvest nodes must ship before T1–T8 crafting feels achievable in live play.
studioImpact: ObjectStore publishes live achievability JSON for Warlords, WCS, and Puter crafting to align on the same economy truth.
knownProductGaps: Recipe chain coverage ~2% — most RECP inputs lack harvest-node sources
Craftable weapons/tools near 0% full-chain until material graph is expanded
Only 16% of materials directly drop from harvest nodes
